Id.description: The identifier of the SQL statement

Status.description: The status of the SQL statement

CreatedAt.description: The date and time the statement was created

UpdatedAt.description: The date and time the statement was last updated

Duration.description: The time in nanoseconds the statement ran

QueryString.description: The SQL statement that was executed

QueryParameters.description: The parameters for the SQL statement

RedshiftPid.description: The process identifier from the Redshift cluster

ResultRows.description: Total number of rows in the result set (FINISHED only)

ResultSize.description: The size of the result set in bytes

HasResultSet.description: Whether the statement has a result set

Error.description: The error message if the statement failed

SubStatements.description: List of sub-statements for a batch execution. Only present for BatchExecuteStatement calls.
